retention.reason: retained archive would exceed the structured-file inventory max_bytes guardrail; closing after distillation instead
retention.rule: Retained closeout evidence preserves reportable closeout facts when the full execplan archive exceeds inventory size guardrails.

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

delegated_judgment.escalate when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

execution_run.what happened: Implemented retained closeout evidence reporting: Planning now writes compact closeout evidence when full archive retention is skipped by size guardrails, and closeout_report prefers the newest retained evidence over older archives.

execution_run.changed surfaces: planning closeout writer/schema/checks, generated planning packages, workspace closeout_report selection, docs, and regression tests
execution_run.validations run: focused retained-evidence tests, ruff, generation/check scripts, planning/workspace test+lint/typecheck, summary, and planning doctor; see proof receipt below

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; retained evidence is schema-backed, package-listed, generated into payloads, validated by focused tests, and broad planning/workspace validation passed.
